description_long: This object is a stylized doll designed to resemble a person in formal attire, featuring a large, rectangular head with a pale face, round black glasses, and a prominent black mustache. The doll's body is dressed in a black suit with a white shirt and black tie, complete with a small white pocket square, evoking a classic, formal look. The head and body are both simplified and cartoonish, with minimal detailing and smooth, rounded surfaces. The back and sides of the doll are mostly black, with a clear separation between the head and body, and no visible limbs or additional features. The overall form is compact and solid, with a slightly tapered lower body and a flat base for stability. The design is playful and modern, making it suitable as a decorative toy or collectible in urban environments.
description: A cartoonish doll in a black suit with glasses and a mustache, featuring a large rectangular head and smooth, minimalistic details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face with round glasses, a mustache, and formal suit details including a tie and pocket square.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the smooth, black side of the head and body, with the face and suit details not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, both solid black with no facial or clothing details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the plain black side of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic formalwear consisting of a black suit jacket, white dress shirt, black tie, and a white pocket square, evoking a traditional business or evening attire.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright position with a straight torso and head facing forward; no arms or legs are visible.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a straight mustache, round glasses, and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving a calm and composed appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, smooth, and black, covering the top and sides of the head in a simple, uniform manner.
